rationale: The proposed homestead exemption increase under Tax Code §11.13(b) has no relation to Elec. Code §254.122, which governs campaign finance reporting for specific-purpose committees involved in multiple elections.
quote: If a specific-purpose committee for supporting or opposing more than one candidate becomes involved in more than one election for which the reporting periods prescribed by Section 254.124 overlap, the reportable activity that occurs during the overlapping period is not required to be included in a report filed after the first report in which the activity is required to be reported.
_note: Rule text is unrelated to the proposed change; no conflict exists.
